creator: rink@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Daniel,

On Sun, Aug 24, 2008 at 09:51:33AM +0000, Daniel wrote:
> It looks like the GEOM output ("GEOM_LABEL: Label msdosfs/XXXXXXXXXXX removed.") is written over the UMASS output.

Yes, this is a FAQ - look at
http://wiki.freebsd.org/JeremyChadwick/Commonly_reported_issues,
"Kernel".

Regards,

--
